news.headline: Tesla Faces China FSD Lawsuit As Robotics Competition Tests Valuation
news.summary: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) is facing a new class-action lawsuit in China alleging false advertising and consumer fraud related to its Full Self-Driving feature. news.headline: NYB.AI Launches Vecura 2.0, Bringing Agentic AI Workflows to Molecular Discovery, with NVIDIA
news.summary: Life science research is entering an AI era, but most discovery teams still cannot use frontier models at scale. Advanced AI models, molecular simulation tools, scientific databases, inference optimization and GPU infrastructure remain fragmented across separate systems. For many pharmaceutical companies, ingredient innovators, biotech teams, and research groups, this makes AI adoption slow, costly, and technically demanding.

news.headline: Why Is Nvidia (NVDA) Stock Soaring Today
news.summary: Shares of leading designer of graphics chips Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) jumped 6.3% in the afternoon session after over 150 million shares traded hands (well above average) as CEO Jensen Huang's keynote at Computex in Taipei delivered two major announcements.

news.headline: Why Is Cloudflare (NET) Stock Soaring Today
news.summary: Shares of cloud security and performance company Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) jumped 11.1% in the afternoon session after it extended its recovery, continuing a rebound from the selloff on May 7 (when it reported earnings) that was, in hindsight, a partial market misread.

news.headline: Why Uber (UBER) Stock Is Trading Up Today
